programme.title: A Deadly Surrogacy
programme.desc: When a surrogate mother disappears, a widow does all she can to save the life of her unborn baby.

programme.title: Baby Monitor Murders
programme.desc: A babysitter believes her employer is plotting to murder someone.

programme.title: My Life Is a Lifetime Movie
programme.desc: A high school history teacher is involved in a sex scandal with one of her students.

programme.title: Baby Sellers
programme.desc: An Immigration and Customs Enforcement agent works undercover to capture a child trafficker.

programme.title: Cradle Did Fall
programme.desc: A woman poses as an infant photographer to befriend a young mother and steal her baby.

programme.title: The Daughter I Gave Away
programme.desc: A girl finds out that her daughter is missing, fifteen years after she gave her up for adoption.

programme.title: Cellmate Secrets: Drew Peterson
programme.desc: Drew Peterson was charged in Kathleen's murder; interviews with his girlfriend, Nicole Speakman.

programme.desc: An Immigration and Customs Enforcement agent works undercover to capture a child trafficker.

programme.title: Abducted: The Carlina White Story
programme.desc: Ann Pettway (Aunjanue Ellis) kidnaps an infant and raises the child as her daughter.

programme.title: Abducted Off the Street: The Carlesha Gaither Story
programme.desc: An abudcted woman tries to outsmart her captor, while her mother stops at nothing to find her.

programme.title: Abducted: The Mary Stauffer Story
programme.desc: A high school teacher and her daughter are held captive for 53 days by a former student.

programme.title: Beyond the Headlines: The College Admissions Scandal With Gretchen Carlson
programme.desc: A college admissions scandal ensnares celebrities and prominent individuals.
